title: Transparent, Post-Quantum Anonymous Set Membership from FRI-STARKs over BabyBear and Mersenne-31
description: A construction-and-analysis note and reproduction package for a transparent (no trusted setup), hash-only, plausibly post-quantum argument of anonymous set membership with a nullifier, realized as a FRI-STARK over a small prime field. Two field instantiations are implemented and measured (GF(p^2) over Mersenne-31, and base-field BabyBear with Poseidon2). This is not peer-reviewed: two security questions, O1 (the GF(p^2)-state Poseidon round counts, specific to the Mersenne-31 arm) and O4 (the formal zero-knowledge simulator, shared by both arms), are stated as open and pending independent review. Implementation completeness does not imply proven soundness.
